name: Tim Phillips
subject: Thanks for standing with AFP!
body:
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c1774c4cf7e5a27408f7b4c0091f9cc439325592ce33266b14de1499bcb692ae120

Peter--

Thank you for helping us fight back against harmful, big-government policies! Americans for Prosperity has a grassroots network of more than 2 million activists across the country who are all dedicated to advancing economic freedom.

http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c17b9cae2fc539a1827c8ec5782deb031ff4e2357c434dea345b0c72527451ca68c

We have
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c17b9cae2fc539a1827c8ec5782deb031ff4e2357c434dea345b0c72527451ca68c
state chapters in more than 30 states across the country! Meet up and connect with local activists.

http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c179e76f08d8084ded74c5bfee20ef09c964d478fa8630d8be38323ccd9248ec66d

Our
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c179e76f08d8084ded74c5bfee20ef09c964d478fa8630d8be38323ccd9248ec66d
Advocate Action Center makes it easy for you to send a message directly to your legislators about the policies and issues that matter most to you.

http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c17e79296e40dfa490d54e8d7f63e65e1a0f0433483f72a4e6d01f57a03c6dd7c80

Check out our
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=6151678d9d0b5c17e79296e40dfa490d54e8d7f63e65e1a0f0433483f72a4e6d01f57a03c6dd7c80
Legislative Scorecard . Find out where your elected officials stand when it comes to economic freedom.

This is going to be a big year for us, and we're glad to have you on board.

More soon,

Tim Phillips
Americans for Prosperity President

clean_body: Peter-- Thank you for helping us fight back against harmful, big-government policies! Americans for Prosperity has a grassroots network of more than 2 million activists across the country who are all dedicated to advancing economic freedom. We have state chapters in more than 30 states across the country! Meet up and connect with local activists. Our Advocate Action Center makes it easy for you to send a message directly to your legislators about the policies and issues that matter most to you. Check out our Legislative Scorecard . Find out where your elected officials stand when it comes to economic freedom. This is going to be a big year for us, and we're glad to have you on board. More soon, Tim Phillips Americans for Prosperity President
